* Emergency department visits without a main problem diagnosis are excluded from this analysis.
† Admitted cases include patients who were admitted to the reporting facility and do not include patients who were transferred to another facility.

NACRS abstracts that contain Main/Other Problem and are reported in this table include all (>95%) in Ontario, Saskatchewan, Alberta and the Yukon, as well as some in P.E.I. and Nova Scotia. In 2024–2025, the percentages of records including Main/Other Problem were as follows: 73% of ED visits in P.E.I. and 22% of ED visits in Nova Scotia.
National Ambulatory Care Reporting System, 2024–2025, Canadian Institute for Health Information.
